topic.what: Neuro-symbolic pipeline automating threat modeling from SysML system architecture to prioritized NIST 800-53 security controls
topic.how: Five-stage pipeline: SysML parsing→CPE-to-CVE lookup→CVE-to-ATT&CK mapping (supervised classifier retrieval LLM)→ATT&CK-to-NIST control recommendation→traceable report generation
topic.why_matters: Threat modeling for CPS is manual time-consuming work; NVD has 198K+ CVEs with 44K added in 2025 alone making manual analysis unsustainable

characteristics.what_it_measures: CVE-to-ATT&CK classification accuracy on 105 parent techniques
characteristics.context: On CWE/CAPEC/KEV labeled dataset with BCEWithLogitsLoss threshold 0.45

characteristics.evidence: Table VI Gemma-4 26B on 419 KEV CVEs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Mean reciprocal rank for CVE-to-ATT&CK retrieval
characteristics.evidence: Table IV MiniLM unsupervised on 45-query KEV test
Table VII pretrained SecureBERT on 94 crosswalk test queries
characteristics.context: Pretrained SecureBERT dominates; fine-tuning hurts due to small crosswalk dataset

characteristics.evidence: Table IV MiniLM on 45-query KEV test
characteristics.context: MiniLM unsupervised outperforms all security-specific models

characteristics.what_it_measures: CVE-to-ATT&CK per-class F1 averaging across 105 techniques
characteristics.evidence: Table V SecureBERT+ severe class imbalance
characteristics.context: Long tail of zero-scoring classes due to insufficient training samples

characteristics.what_it_measures: Gemma-4 LLM weighted F1 on CVE-to-ATT&CK
characteristics.context: LLM lower F1 but higher hit rates than supervised classifier

characteristics.what_it_measures: Gemma-4 LLM fraction of true labels recovered in top-5
characteristics.evidence: Table VI Gemma-4 26B KEV no-hint mode
characteristics.context: LLM recovers more rare classes but lower overall recall than F1 suggests

good_for: automated threat modeling for CPS with SysML architecture
NIST 800-53 control recommendation from ATT&CK techniques
rapid security assessment of healthcare IoT systems
ensemble combining supervised retrieval and zero-shot LLM approaches
not_for: Systems with vague SysML component descriptions
Fully automated decisions without analyst review
requires: NVD bulk JSON feeds (2020-2026 snapshot used)
Local LLM server for Gemma-4 26B (reproducibility hardware-dependent)

novelty: First end-to-end automated pipeline from SysML architecture to NIST 800-53 controls
First comparison of supervised classifier vs retrieval vs zero-shot LLM for CVE-to-ATT&CK on same dataset
Demonstration that generic MiniLM outperforms domain-specific models (SecureBERT ATTACK-BERT)
Discovery that pretrained SecureBERT dominates ATT&CK-to-NIST retrieval despite fine-tuning degradation
Complete traceability from SysML component→CPE→CVE→ATT&CK→NIST control
open_problems: Real-time NVD integration for continuous monitoring
User study with practicing security analysts measuring effort reduction
CPE matching improvement for vague SysML descriptions
